title: coreopsis queretarensis
intro: Coreopsis queretarensis, also known as the Mexican tickseed, is a perennial plant species belonging to the sunflower family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Coreopsis queretarensis include its ability to reduce inflammation, alleviate symptoms of colds and flu, and exhibit antioxidant properties. In herbal preparations, the plant can be used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions that can be consumed to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
